name: EQUITY BANCSHARES INC
summary: Part I Item 1: B usiness Our Company We are a financial holding company headquartered in Wichita, Kansas. Our wholly-owned banking subsidiary, Equity Bank, provides a broad range of financial services primarily to businesses and business owners as well as individuals through our network of 77 branches located in Arkansas, Kansas, Missouri and Oklahoma, as of December 31, 2025. As of December 31, 2025, we had, on a consolidated basis, total assets of $6.37 billion, total deposits of $5.14 billion...
